specifications.description: Views MUST NOT perform data calculations or complex filtering. Business logic related to a single model SHALL be implemented in Model Methods. Query logic MUST be encapsulated in Custom Managers.
Operations involving more than one Model or external APIs MUST be encapsulated in a 'services.py' module. Views SHALL ONLY call these services and handle the HTTP Response.
Queries in Views or Serializers MUST use .select_related() or .prefetch_related() for foreign keys. The AI Agent SHALL flag any loop that performs a database query inside.
Serializers MUST NOT use '__all__'. All fields MUST be explicitly listed to prevent unintended data exposure. Validation logic SHOULD reside within 'validate_<field_name>' methods.
All Services MUST return a consistent structure or raise custom exceptions. The Backend SHALL NOT return generic 500 errors for handled business logic failures.
All DRF Views MUST declare an explicit 'permission_classes'. Using 'AllowAny' MUST be justified with a comment. Role-based access MUST use custom Permission classes, not inline conditionals in views.
